text: The Vision of Joshua the High Priest

segments.text: Then the angel showed me Joshua the high priest standing before the angel of the LORD, with Satan standing at his right hand to accuse him.
And the LORD said to Satan:
The LORD rebukes you, Satan! Indeed, the LORD, who has chosen Jerusalem, rebukes you! Is not this man a firebrand snatched from the fire?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Now Joshua was dressed in filthy garments as he stood before the angel.
So the angel said to those standing before him,
See, I have removed your iniquity, and I will clothe you with splendid robes.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Let them put a clean turban on his head.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: So a clean turban was placed on his head, and they clothed him, as the angel of the LORD stood by.
Then the angel of the LORD gave this charge to Joshua:

This is what the LORD of Hosts says: ‘If you walk in My ways and keep My instructions, then you will govern My house and will also have charge of My courts; and I will give you a place among these who are standing here.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Hear now, O high priest Joshua, you and your companions seated before you, who are indeed a sign. For behold, I am going to bring My servant, the Branch.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: See the stone I have set before Joshua; on that one stone are seven eyes.  Behold, I will engrave on it an inscription, declares the LORD of Hosts, and I will remove the iniquity of this land in a single day.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: On that day, declares the LORD of Hosts, you will each invite your neighbor to sit under your own vine and fig tree.’
segments.speaker: the Angel
